use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dashboards
Secondary actions alongside primary buttons with outline or ghost variants
Destructive actions like delete or cancel with destructive variant
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation bars
AsChild composition for integrating Radix UI slots with custom components
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Designed as a foundational atomic component for any React UI system, providing accessible button interactions with focus-visible states, hover effects, and disabled handling. Can be composed via asChild prop for advanced component integration.
